title: Jbu001 Modpack
description: A Forge Modpack with some Fabric additions! Build with Create, explore with Ad Astra, enjoy new Biomes, Voice Chat, Cameras, TV Screens, and Seasons for a more immersive experience.
body:
**Jbu001 Modpack – A Refined & Expanded Minecraft Vanilla+ Experience**

This Modpack enhances Minecraft with a carefully curated selection of mods that improve exploration, automation, survival, and overall gameplay—without changing too much about the gameplay. Whether you're a builder, adventurer, or redstone engineer, this modpack expands your possibilities while keeping performance in check.


- **Expanded World Generation** – Biomes O’ Plenty and other world-enhancing mods make every new world feel fresh, with diverse landscapes, unique structures, and new biomes to explore.
- **Create-Powered Automation** – The Create mod (with several add-ons) lets you design elaborate mechanical systems, from simple contraptions to complex industrial setups.
- **Improved Survival & Progression** – Better farming, cooking, inventory management, and survival tweaks ensure a smoother and more immersive experience.
- **Enhanced Visuals & Performance** – Shaders, lighting improvements, and optimization mods provide smoother FPS and a polished look without sacrificing performance.
- **Quality-of-Life Upgrades** – Small but impactful tweaks like better tooltips, UI enhancements, and improved building tools make every session more enjoyable.


**Why Download This Modpack?**

This pack is designed for players who love vanilla but want more depth and functionality. It keeps the core Minecraft charm intact while offering smarter automation, richer exploration, and smoother gameplay. Whether you’re crafting intricate machines, exploring new biomes, or just looking for a better survival experience. It delivers a refined yet feature-packed adventure.
